title: rubia peregrina var. lucida
intro: Rubia peregrina var. lucida, also known as the lucid wild madder or shining madder, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rubia peregrina plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the roots of Rubia peregrina var. lucida have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions, as well as having potential antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. The roots of the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these preparations.
